scale.h1: text-4xl md:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-medium tracking-tight leading-[1.1]
scale.caption: text-xs tracking-widest uppercase font-semibold text-muted-foreground/80

primary.description: Deep Emerald - The color of old velvet and deep forests.

secondary.description: Burnished Gold - Used sparingly for key actions and status highlights.

background.description: Alabaster Bone - Warm, paper-like texture, never clinical white.

surface.description: Pure white cards on the off-white background create subtle depth.

dashboard_grid.description: High density but breathable. Asymmetric spans.

room_list.card_style: Aspect-ratio 4/3 image top, refined typography bottom. No buttons visible until hover.

marketing_hero.image_style: lg:w-1/2 h-full object-cover grayscale-[20%] hover:grayscale-0 transition-all duration-700 ease-out

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground h-12 px-8 rounded-sm font-medium tracking-wide hover:bg-primary/90 transition-transform active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-input text-foreground h-12 px-6 rounded-sm hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground

cards.default: bg-card text-card-foreground border-none shadow-card rounded-sm p-6
cards.interactive: group hover:shadow-floating transition-all duration-300 border border-transparent hover:border-border/50 cursor-pointer

inputs.default: h-12 bg-transparent border-b border-input rounded-none px-0 focus-visible:ring-0 focus-visible:border-primary placeholder:text-muted-foreground/50 font-light

tables.header: bg-stone-50/50 text-xs uppercase tracking-widest text-stone-500 font-semibold h-12

rooms.alt: Master Suite - King Bed with Ocean View

universal_guidelines: NEVER use default blue/sky blue colors. Use Emerald/Forest greens or Metallic Golds.
Avoid standard 'dashboard look'. Make it look like a digital magazine or a high-end print manifest.
Transitions must be 'ease-out' and slow (duration-500 or duration-700).
All interactive elements must have `data-testid` attributes.
Do not use gradients on text. It looks cheap.
Marketing pages use custom HTML/Tailwind. Dashboards use customized Shadcn.
accessibility_checklist: Ensure contrast ratio of 4.5:1 for normal text.
Interactive elements must have focus rings (customized to gold/emerald).
Images must have descriptive alt text.
